conversation.text: Hey, do you remember those summers we used to spend at Grandma's house?

translations.Somali: Haye, ma xasuusataa xagaagii aan ku qaadan jirnay guriga ayeeyo?

conversation.text: Oh, absolutely! Those were the best times. I loved how we would play in the garden all day.

translations.Somali: Oo, haa! Kuwas waxay ahaayeen waqtiyadii ugu fiicnaa. Aad baan ugu jeclaa sida aan maalintii oo dhan ugu ciyaari jirnay beerta.

conversation.text: And Grandma would always make us those delicious cookies. I can still taste them!

translations.Somali: Ayeeyo had iyo jeer waxay noo samayn jirtay buskudkaas macaan. Weli waan ku dhadhamin karaa!

conversation.text: Yeah, and we would sit on the porch in the evenings, listening to her stories about when she was young.

translations.Somali: Haa, waxaanan ku fariisan jirnay balbalada fiidkii, annagoo dhageysanayna sheekooyinkeeda marka ay yaraantii.

conversation.text: Those stories were amazing. She had such an adventurous life. Remember the one about her trip to Europe?

translations.Somali: Sheekooyinkaas waxay ahaayeen kuwo cajiib ah. Nolosheedu waxay ahayd mid xiiso leh. Ma xasuusataa tii ku saabsanayd safarkeeda Yurub?

conversation.text: How could I forget? I always dreamed of going on adventures like hers. And Mom would join in with her own stories about their family vacations.

translations.Somali: Sideen u illaawi karaa? Mar walba waxaan ku riyoon jiray inaan yeesho safarro la mid ah kuwii iyada. Hooyo iyaduna waxay nagu soo biiri jirtay sheekooyinkeeda ku saabsan fasaxyada qoyska.
